chapter_title: Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
text:
This chapter applies only to:

(1) a municipality that:

(A) has a population greater than 30,000 and operates under a council-manager form of government; or

(B) has a population of 500,000 or more; and

(2) an airport operated by a joint board to which Section 22.074 (Joint Board) (d) applies.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 682. Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
##### § 682.001 — Applicability

This chapter applies only to:

    (1) a municipality that:

        (A) has a population greater than 30,000 and operates under a council-manager form of government; or

        (B) has a population of 500,000 or more; and

    (2) an airport operated by a joint board to which Section 22.074 (Joint Board) (d) applies.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 310, Sec. 1, eff. May 29, 1999.*
